name: Queen's Sigil of Corruption
description: A large, bright-red, intricate and regal demonic crest has formed on your loins, pulsing imperiously with sweetly corruptive, intoxicating pleasure, filling your head with dizzyingly submissive giddy arousal, tripling your Spirit losses and lowering your Willpower by 40! There is no way to clear this other than victory... But maybe you should just surrender instead?♥
